label: Render with ShotStack
description: Render video or audio via the ShotStack cloud API. Uses the current generator template JSON or a ShotStack JSON from a workflow variable. Polls for completion and saves the result URL. Supports render strategy: ShotStack-first with local fallback, local-first with ShotStack fallback, and credit-gated modes for production renders.

inputs.description: Row variable containing ShotStack JSON. Leave empty to use the current generator template.
ShotStack API environment: stage (sandbox, watermarked) or v1 (production).
Output format: mp4, gif, mp3, wav.
Resolution scaling: auto (cap at 1080p equivalent), or a specific scale like 0.5, 1.

Render strategy: shotstack (cloud only), local (browser only), shotstack-first (try cloud, fallback to local), local-first (try local, fallback to cloud), credit-gate (cloud if credits available, else local).
Template ID for local rendering fallback (required for strategies that use local rendering).
JSON object mapping merge field names to row variables for local rendering fallback.
Project ID for queuing the render URL (pending generations). Empty = resolve from row / Library default / defaultProjectId.
Fallback project id when projectId is empty.

outputs.description: Row variable to store the rendered file URL.
Row variable to store the ShotStack render ID.
Row variable to store which method was used: 'shotstack' or 'local'.

formSchema.label: ShotStack JSON variable key
formSchema.hint: Row variable containing a ShotStack JSON object with a timeline. Required in workflow mode. Use the generator Render ShotStack button for the current template.

formSchema.label: Resolution scale
formSchema.hint: 'auto' caps at 1080p equivalent. Or set a number like 0.5, 1, 1.5.

formSchema.label: Render strategy

options.label: ShotStack if credits available → else local

formSchema.hint: How to handle rendering. 'credit-gate' checks credits before production renders and falls back to local if insufficient.

formSchema.label: Local template ID (for local/fallback)
formSchema.hint: Generator template ID used for local rendering. Required when strategy involves local rendering.

formSchema.label: Local input map (JSON, optional)
formSchema.hint: Merge field values for local rendering. JSON object mapping field names to row variables.

formSchema.label: Save render method to variable
formSchema.hint: Stores 'shotstack' or 'local' indicating which method was used.

formSchema.label: Timeout (ms)
formSchema.hint: Max wait for render completion. Default 5 minutes.

formSchema.label: Project ID (for generation queue)
formSchema.hint: Saves render URL to pending generations when set. Template vars; if empty, uses Library uploads default or defaultProjectId below.

formSchema.label: Default project ID (optional)
formSchema.hint: When projectId field is empty after templates.
